problem.title: LiTAMIN2 cluster T1 on KITTI seq 08 full (long urban, seed-flip territory)
problem.question: seq 00/07 both pick cluster T1 (voxel=0.5 + iter=12 + seed). seq 08 is the second long urban-driving seq where CT-ICP +seed has the +369% RPE catastrophe. Does LiTAMIN2 cluster T1+seed avoid the same RPE explosion?

variants.label: cluster T1: voxel=0.5 + iter=12 + seed
variants.intent: Confirm cluster T1 transfers to seq 08 long urban.
